title: stelis succuba
intro: Stelis succuba, a species of orchid found in Central and South America, is a type of epiphyte that grows on other plants, often in tropical rainforests. Traditionally, Stelis succuba has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including treating respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, and has been used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions. However, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects, and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
